title: Evaluation Provenance and Data Dashboard Flexibility

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Kickoff: implementing flexible Data dashboard and evaluation provenance links. Dependencies wired per plan; first task in progress (plx-d4d408). No fallback/inference paths.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Design pivot per operator constraint: no Evaluation schema migration. Provenance link implementation now uses scoreVersionId field plus parameters.dataset_id (single path) for dataset linkage. Removed schema/query additions for Evaluation.dataSetId.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Evaluation provenance tracking and data dashboard flexibility implemented.
